revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Furuichi Kofun Group); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:wikipedia>Cewbot]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Furuichi_Kofun_Cluster here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1334626126 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|history=y}} {{WikiProject Archaeology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject World Heritage Sites}} {{WikiProject Historic sites|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Death|importance=mid}} }} {{old move|date=11 January 2026|from=Furuichi Kofun Cluster|destination=Furuichi Kofun Group|result=moved|link=Special:Permalink/1333596209#Requested move 11 January 2026}} == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Furuichi kofungun]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=758593728 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20110719143924/http://www.city.fujiidera.osaka.jp/9,1053,97,141.html to http://www.city.fujiidera.osaka.jp/9,1053,97,141.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 11:14, 6 January 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Requested move 11 January 2026 ==
:''The following is a closed discussion of a [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]. '''Please do not modify it.''' Subsequent comments should be made in a new section on the talk page. Editors desiring to contest the closing decision should consider a [[Wikipedia:move review|move review]] {{strong|after}} discussing it on the closer's talk page. No further edits should be made to this discussion.'' The result of the move request was: '''moved.''' Moved as an [[WP:RMNOMIN{{!}}uncontested request with minimal participation]]. If there is any objection within a reasonable time frame, please ask me to reopen the discussion; if I am not available, please ask at the [[WP:RM/TR#Requests to revert undiscussed moves{{!}}technical requests]] page. ([[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Closing instructions#Closure by a page mover|closed by non-admin page mover]]) [[User:Jeffrey34555|Jeffrey34555]] ([[User talk:Jeffrey34555|talk]]) 18:34, 24 January 2026 (UTC) ---- * [[:Furuichi Kofun Cluster]] → {{no redirect|Furuichi Kofun Group}} * [[:Mozu Tombs]] → {{no redirect|Mozu Kofun Group}} – These two kofun groups are regularly discussed together as the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group, however, when seperate, they appear to retain that format when discussed individually as well, therefore I'm proposing moving the two to the same format for consistently. Unesco uses Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group for the two[https://whc.unesco.org/en/list/1593/] as does the official website for the Group[https://www.mozu-furuichi.jp/en/learn/mozu_furuichi.html] and Sakai City[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/foreign-language/english/visitors/topics/world_heritage_site/index.html] (though mixed names for the individual groups). There are also some instances of more scholarly sources using this format.[https://hal.science/hal-03589126/][https://d1wqtxts1xzle7.cloudfront.net/63128377/OUHSS_TT20200428-47860-itp3i3-libre.pdf?1588736254=&response-content-disposition=inline%3B+filename%3DNonaka_Kofun_and_the_Age_of_the_Five_Kin.pdf&Expires=1768162486&Signature=ISxISOOgY3PkXnfj-b3XnB0KbycS76s7u1MqIlweGEbqJ9LqLHR~CPT0YgUJVTdHkg6E7LHL0eatLR3OWlaMq9URiGlU3dxLD1xMD-GdyPNMg~XppK3gxsKGGw2-oMfYpR9RPhT3iqp3ygBVtJ2TcJBcDcVeB7Ltlx6PfYr9ntmp6GvLznVU3ZLkkNZiA0LNpxgJCDSoG508v5mG3mpiSKntwz5Azu3FfT~mG~HkSQIM-SMhdvyTgPH9JrdJM9J9mp84gSJMblAMvGDZ-tr~qrmFZbDcEFYQlyM~SARCrd1x~z1egzeahWOIZrd1WHRuYu6ynyk9RTOuF4NNjMg4KA__&Key-Pair-Id=APKAJLOHF5GGSLRBV4ZA] [[User:Erynamrod|Erynamrod]] ([[User talk:Erynamrod|talk]]) 19:39, 11 January 2026 (UTC) — '''''Relisting.''''' [[User:Jeffrey34555|Jeffrey34555]] ([[User talk:Jeffrey34555|talk]]) 18:37, 18 January 2026 (UTC)
The discussion above is closed. Please do not modify it. Subsequent comments should be made on the appropriate discussion page. No further edits should be made to this discussion.
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
